ValidationRule.description: Ensures that when a Threshold Amount is provided, both the Threshold Mode and Threshold Currency fields are also completed.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(ThresholdAmount__c)), ThresholdAmount__c > 0, OR( ISPICKVAL(ThresholdMode__c, ""), ISPICKVAL(ThresholdAmountCurrency__c, "") ), NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Threshold Mode and Threshold Currency are required when a Threshold Amount is specified.
